{{CargoOrgan
|name=Demon Skull
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10863
|idx=70
|description="Buddy, you're a devil, make a big noise. Playing in the abyss, gonna be a big lord someday. You got blood on your face, you big crisis. Kicking the skulls all over the place, singin'..."
—Selections from the Pop King of Abyss
|skill=
|hp=2218
|def=232
|atk=183
|rush=208
|gene1=In Demon or Dragon Forms, {race} ATK +120
|gene2=When in Demon or Dragon Forms:
> Gain +6% Cells in explorations
|gene3=Fire DMG +90
|gene4=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +15%
|gene5=Demon God Cabin, deployable robots +3
|gene7=Demon God Cabin, deployable robots +9 (Awakened)
|}}
